problem: What material is biocompatible, conductive, and flexible enough for long-term brain implants?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to long-term, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
